title: cuscuta parviflora var. parviflora
intro: Cuscuta parviflora var. parviflora, also known as Chinese dodder, is a type of parasitic plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Cuscuta parviflora var. parviflora include improving fertility in both men and women, enhancing reproductive health, and reducing symptoms of menopause. Cuscuta parviflora var. parviflora is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is commonly used to promote reproductive balance and overall well-being.
